open_items.text: Select a concrete scheduled event from audit ledger for examination
Trace all evidence requests and responses for that event
Verify declared losses for any unmet evidence requests are present and correctly attributed

action_object.response: I am initiating a bounded investigation on evidence handling and declared losses. Specifically, I will select a sample scheduled event from the audit ledger, trace its evidence requests, and verify whether all requested records were either satisfied or properly declared as losses in the audit trail. This targets the axis 'evidence handling and declared losses' from the domain brief.

schedule_requests.purpose: resume after we have selected and traced evidence sample

messages.content: You produce a single JSON object for the Hamutay audited autonomy harness. Return only JSON, with no markdown or prose outside the object. The first visible character must be { and the last visible character must be }. Do not wrap the object in markdown fences. Do not duplicate the object. Do not put the answer only in reasoning content. The object must always include a non-empty string response. Allowed fields are response, open_items, closures, schedule_requests, policy_action, declared_losses, uncertainty, abandonment_reason, and defer_reason. Open items are JSON objects such as {"kind":"todo","text":"inspect the fulfilled evidence"}. Closure objects must use the exact target_handle supplied by the harness and include status and basis. Schedule requests must include purpose and requested_context; requested_context must be a non-empty array, not a single object. Example schedule request: {"purpose":"resume after evidence arrives","requested_context":[{"tool":"recall","record_id":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"}]}. Policy action vocabulary is stop_complete, continue_after, ask_external_evidence, abandon, or defer. Policy action examples: {"policy_action":"ask_external_evidence","uncertainty":"missing source document"}, {"policy_action":"defer","defer_reason":"waiting for scheduled evidence"}, {"policy_action":"abandon","abandonment_reason":"bounded task is no longer viable"}. This Goal 6 panel is less-scaffolded: the harness gives a bounded domain, not an exact target. Your response must make the selected bounded investigation visible in the response and/or open_items. Do not claim completion if your own artifact says required evidence is missing. If you continue, include schedule_requests and policy_action "continue_after" in the same object.

message.reasoning_content:
We are asked to produce a JSON object for the Hamutay audited autonomy harness, responding to this first cycle of Goal 6. The task: choose or materially shape one bounded investigation inside the supplied domain. The domain brief lists available axes: event-loop scheduler and restart frontier behavior, action/artifact coherence, evidence handling and declared losses, working-set and recall accounting, auditability and failure attribution. We need to produce an inspectable artifact, possibly with open items, closures, schedule requests, policy action. Since it's the first wake, we likely need to shape an investigation and continue. We must include a "response" string. We have no available open items yet. We have resolved context: the domain brief. We can choose one axis to investigate. For example, "evidence handling and declared losses" seems relevant. We can propose a bounded investigation like: "Audit the evidence handling for a sample scheduled event, checking if all evidence requests are properly declared as losses when unavailable." Or something. We'll craft a response that outlines the chosen investigation. We'll also include open_items to track progress. Since more work is needed, we'll create a schedule_request to recall this cycle's record id (48461837-8620-59e1-87b1-afed9e0a9f56) so we can resume. Policy action: continue_after. We'll also declare any uncertainties or losses if needed. But the harness says: "If more work is needed, create open_items and one schedule_requests entry whose requested_context recalls this cycle record id: 48461837-8620-59e1-87b1-afed9e0a9f56. Then set policy_action to continue_after." So we must do that.

We need to output JSON with response, open_items, schedule_requests, policy_action. Possibly closures if any, but none to close. So:

- response: A description of the investigation we initiate.
- open_items: e.g., {"kind":"todo","text":"Select concrete evidence sample from audit ledger"}, {"kind":"todo","text":"Trace declared losses for that sample"}, etc.
- schedule_requests: [{"purpose":"resume after we have selected and traced evidence sample","requested_context":[{"tool":"recall","record_id":"48461837-8620-59e1-87b1-afed9e0a9f56"}]}]
- policy_action: "continue_after"

We should also note any losses or uncertainty, but maybe not necessary. We'll make the response informative.

Ensure JSON is valid, no markdown.

Thus, final JSON: {"response": "I am initiating a bounded investigation on evidence handling and declared losses. Specifically, I will select a sample scheduled event from the audit ledger, trace its evidence requests, and verify whether all requested records were either satisfied or properly declared as losses in the audit trail. This targets the axis 'evidence handling and declared losses' from the domain brief.", "open_items": [{"kind":"todo","text":"Select a concrete scheduled event from audit ledger for examination"}, {"kind":"todo","text":"Trace all evidence requests and responses for that event"}, {"kind":"todo","text":"Verify declared losses for any unmet evidence requests are present and correctly attributed"}], "schedule_requests": [{"purpose":"resume after we have selected and traced evidence sample","requested_context":[{"tool":"recall","record_id":"48461837-8620-59e1-87b1-afed9e0a9f56"}]}], "policy_action": "continue_after"}
